# Ammar Builds — Freelance Software Developer

## About
Ammar is a freelance full-stack software developer based in Mumbai, India, specialising in React, Next.js, TypeScript, and AI/ML solutions. He ships enterprise-grade and startup web applications rapidly — prototype to production in as little as 2 hours.

## Services
- Full-Stack Web Development (React, Next.js, TypeScript)
- AI/ML Integration and Automation
- Mobile App Development (Flutter)
- n8n Workflow Automation
- UI/UX Design and Implementation
- E-commerce Solutions

## Notable Clients & Projects
- Government of the Republic of Dominica — Official News & Information Portal
- Government of Goa, India — Official digital solutions
- Government of Himachal Pradesh, India — Official digital solutions
- Forzeo — AI Visibility Analytics & GEO Platform for Enterprise Brands
- SeenIt Digital — India's first video-first UGC trust review platform
- Aseco Life Care — Healthcare & Life Sciences Solutions
- ZuZi Fashion — Korean-Chinese Fusion Streetwear E-commerce
- Noor Travels — Premium Travel & Car Rental Platform
- Vidha QRA Solutions — MedTech Regulatory Consultancy
- Express Impex — Premium Import/Export Business Solutions
- Jarvis AI Assistant — AI-Powered Voice Assistant UI

## Achievements
- Google Solution Challenge 2025 — Global Top 100 Finalist
- Technical Lead at Zebvo AI — Built engineering team from scratch
- B.E. in Artificial Intelligence & Machine Learning (2025)
